mapper.sql: id, category_name, sort, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM book_category WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM book_category WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = #{status} ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
SELECT FROM book_category ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_category (category_name, sort, status) VALUES (#{categoryName}, COALESCE(#{sort}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 1))
mapper.update: UPDATE book_category category_name = #{categoryName},sort = #{sort},status = #{status}, WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE book_category SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
